hypothesis: The proposed strategy combines Bollinger Bands (BB), On Balance Volume (OBV) and Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) to identify potential buying opportunities in the market. The logic behind this combination is that BB provides a measure of price volatility, OBV shows changes in trading volume and MACD helps confirm trend direction.

This strategy uses the Bollinger Bands and ATR indicators to identify potential trend changes in the market, with added confirmation from the Relative Strength Index (RSI). By combining these three widely used technical indicators, this strategy aims to reduce false signals while maintaining a high probability of successful trades.
